text:
Setup scripts are basically digital plumbing. You only notice them when they're broken, and when they are, everything is terrible.

We just merged a fix for the OpenClaw setup script (v2026.3). It now does exactly what it's supposed to do: gets completely out of your way so you can actually build things. Less time configuring, more time creating.

Everything is in the repo. Go make something weird today. 🛠️✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #codinglife #developer #lofiart #buildinpublic
